prompt: Generate a monthly SEO performance report for domain 'example.com' for June 2024. Include organic traffic trend, top 5 ranking pages, average position, and 3 actionable recommendations.

mock_result.response:
Monthly SEO Report: example.com — June 2024

Organic Traffic:
- Total sessions: 12,450 (+8.3% MoM)
- Organic CTR: 3.2% (benchmark: 2.8%)
- Avg. session duration: 2m 14s

Top 5 Ranking Pages:
1. /blog/ai-automation — Pos 3.2 — 2,100 clicks
2. / (homepage) — Pos 4.8 — 1,850 clicks
3. /pricing — Pos 6.1 — 980 clicks
4. /features — Pos 7.4 — 760 clicks
5. /docs/quickstart — Pos 5.9 — 690 clicks

Average Position: 5.5 (target: <5.0)

Recommendations:
1. Add FAQ schema to /pricing — potential featured snippet capture
2. Improve /features page load time (LCP 3.8s) to boost Core Web Vitals score
3. Build 3 backlinks to /blog/ai-automation to strengthen domain authority for head terms
